rule_metadata.author: Olaf Hartong, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Aleksey Potapov, oscd.community
rule_metadata.title: HackTool - Potential CobaltStrike Process Injection

rules.rule_text:
title: HackTool - Potential CobaltStrike Process Injection
id: 6309645e-122d-4c5b-bb2b-22e4f9c2fa42
status: test
description: Detects a potential remote threat creation with certain characteristics
  which are typical for Cobalt Strike beacons
references:
- https://medium.com/@olafhartong/cobalt-strike-remote-threads-detection-206372d11d0f
- https://blog.cobaltstrike.com/2018/04/09/cobalt-strike-3-11-the-snake-that-eats-its-tail/
author: Olaf Hartong, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Aleksey Potapov, oscd.community
date: 2018-11-30
modified: 2023-05-05
tags:
- attack.privilege-escalation
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.t1055.001
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: create_remote_thread
detection:
  selection:
    StartAddress|endswith:
    - 0B80
    - 0C7C
    - 0C88
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
